title: 2026-06-23 Shino Hanoi Lotus Rain
summary: Shino character-day reinterpretation of the Hanoi lotus rain errands set, remade with the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style as the active reference while preserving the daily set's lotus-pink clothing ideas, Hanoi places, and a slightly bolder travel mood.
summaryJa: 紫乃のハノイ雨季アルバム。色の軸はロータスピンク。紙、花、湖、音楽前の小さな夜と、旅先で少し大胆な余白。

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, in the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style, inside a rainy paper and fabric shop on Hang Bong Street in Hanoi Old Quarter on 2026-06-23, choosing lotus-pink paper samples for a notebook with careful hands, wearing a dusty lotus-pink sleeveless tailored vest over a white cotton tee, cropped dark olive rain trousers, sheer ankle socks, low black mules, and a small fish charm on her tote
images.title: 01 Office Hang Bong paper samples
images.locationDetail: Hang Bong Street paper and fabric shop

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, in the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style, tying a lotus-pink ribbon around lotus flowers at Hanoi Quang Ba Flower Market after rain on 2026-06-23, wearing a cropped lotus-pink knit tank, ivory short-sleeve utility shirt, charcoal balloon half pants with a wrapped apron panel, ribbed socks, silver-gray Mary Jane flats, and a small fish pin
images.title: 02 Market Quang Ba flower ribbon

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, in the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style, standing near Hanoi Truc Bach and West Lake in gray afternoon drizzle on 2026-06-23, checking a folded map under an ordinary readable Truc Bach street-name sign while slightly lost but quietly pleased, wearing a charcoal sleeveless top, lotus-pink asymmetric mini wrap skirt over black city shorts, thin rain cardigan, smoky knee-high socks, low-heel black mules, and a bag with fish charm
images.title: 03 Date Truc Bach rain map
images.locationDetail: Truc Bach lake and West Lake edge

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, in the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style, inside The Hanoi Social Club before a small acoustic music and dinner night on 2026-06-23, seated at a small table with event notes and adjusting a lotus-pink earring, wearing a black satin camisole, dusty lotus-pink satin mini wrap skirt over tailored black city shorts, sheer black knee-high socks, low slingback pumps, silver chain belt, and a small bag with fish charm
images.title: 04 Theater Hanoi Social Club earring

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, in the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style, near Hanoi Truc Bach and West Lake in gray afternoon drizzle on 2026-06-23, adjusting her hair and sandal strap under an ordinary readable Truc Bach street-name sign, wearing a charcoal sleeveless top, lotus-pink asymmetric mini wrap skirt over black city shorts, thin rain cardigan, smoky knee-high socks, low-heel black mules, and a bag with fish charm; a slightly bolder travel-day version of the rainy lake scene
images.title: 05 Date Truc Bach sandal hair
images.locationDetail: Truc Bach lake and West Lake edge

images.alt: Shino, adult 25, in the 2026-06-21 Shino visual style, inside The Hanoi Social Club before a small acoustic music and dinner night on 2026-06-23, adjusting a lotus-pink earring near a small stage and rain-lit window, wearing a black satin camisole, dusty lotus-pink satin mini wrap skirt over tailored black city shorts, sheer black knee-high socks, low slingback pumps, silver chain belt, and a small bag with fish charm; a slightly bolder travel-night version of the pre-show moment
